name: Gelato Di Ricotta
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Marsala (or substitute Madeira or sherry)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the powdered sugar and Marsala until the sugar dissolves.
2. Push the ricotta through a sieve into the mixture and stir well.
3. Chill thoroughly.
4. When ready to proceed, whip the cream until soft peaks form.
5. Fold the whipped cream into the ricotta mixture.
6. Transfer to an ice cream machine and freeze according to the machine's directions.
7. Makes 1 quart.
